name: tanuj-arora-portfolio
description: Professional portfolio website with automatic PDF resume updates

scripts.backup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-');fs.copyFileSync('index.html',p.join('backups',\`index-\${d}.html\"));console.log('Backup created: index-'+d+'.html');"

author: Tanuj Arora
